name: AMPAK Technology Inc.
summary: AMPAK Technology Inc. operates as an optical communication and wireless multimedia company in Taiwan. The company operates through two business units, Wireless Multi-Media and Optical Communication. The Wireless Multi-Media business unit offers wireless multimedia products, such as Systems in Package and wireless HDMI. The Optical Communication business unit provides Tocan packaging and testing services for optoelectronic components, as well as various solutions for the optoelectronics industry. The company serves the industrial PC, energy efficiency, audio, consumer electronics, VR, UAV, wearable, medical, and automotive markets. AMPAK Technology Inc. was founded in 2000 and is based in Hsinchu, Taiwan.
